title: Senior Doctor - BD India Holdings Services - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - BD India Holdings Services - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? BD India Holdings Services in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About BD India Holdings Services:
BD India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BD India Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
